data.name: Zhaohui

weaponImprint.name: Juggernaut
weaponImprint.trait: Gains [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] at the start of the next action for 1 turn if the user moves 5 tiles or more.
weaponImprint.effect: When any weakness is exploited, damage dealt is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. Critical damage against targets affected by Hydro debuffs is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to PMC units is increased by 2.5%. If the target has any Hydro debuff, the damage is further increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A stoic Doll with rich combat experience, she is unpretentious and decisive in action. As the leader of Monsoon Squad, she excels in combat and handling team affairs but is still a novice at lightening the mood. Don't hesitate to welcome her - a hero pursuing justice is always worthy of trust.

skills.name: Piercing Wind
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Shadow Strike
skills.description:
At the end of the action, Zhaohui may select any Imperturbable Arrow within 9 tiles and land on the selected tile within 2 tiles of the Imperturbable Arrow, gaining 1 point of Confectance Index.

When an enemy unit within attack range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, Zhaohui launches [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack, 2 points of stability damage, and applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] for 2 turns to the enemy unit. This effect can be triggered up to once per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, Zhaohui summons 1 Imperturbable Arrow on a surrounding tile. When any Imperturbable Arrow is on the field, Zhaohui's damage dealt is increased by 10%. At the end of the action, Zhaohui may select any Imperturbable Arrow within 9 tiles and land on the selected tile within 2 tiles of the Imperturbable Arrow, gaining 1 point of Confectance Index.

When an enemy unit within attack range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, Zhaohui launches [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack, 2 points of stability damage, and applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] for 2 turns to the enemy unit. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, Zhaohui summons 1 Imperturbable Arrow on a surrounding tile. When any Imperturbable Arrow is on the field, Zhaohui's damage dealt is increased by 10%. At the end of the action, Zhaohui may select any Imperturbable Arrow and land on the selected tile within 2 tiles of the Imperturbable Arrow, gaining 1 point of Confectance Index.

When an enemy unit within attack range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, Zhaohui launches [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] once, dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack, 2 points of stability damage, and applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] for 2 turns to the enemy unit. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.

Before attacking, if the target has 2 or more debuffs, increases damage dealt to it by 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: At the start of the battle, Zhaohui summons 1 Imperturbable Arrow on surrounding tile. The maximum activations of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is increased by 1. When any Imperturbable Arrow is on the field, Zhaohui's damage dealt is increased by 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: At the end of the action, Imperturbable Arrow can now be selected from anywhere on the field. The maximum activations of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is increased by 1. Before attacking, if the target has 2 or more debuffs, increases damage dealt to it by 20%.

skills.name: Shadow Snare
skills.description: Selects a direction and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 110% of attack to all enemy targets within 4 tiles in the selected direction. If the target has any Hydro debuff, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 1 turn. Zhaohui gains 1 point of Confectance Index for each target hit, and increases the critical rate of the next active attack by 10%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects a direction and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 110% of attack to all enemy targets within 4 tiles in the selected direction, applying [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] for 1 turn. For each target hit, Zhaohui gains 1 point of Confectance Index, restores 1 point of stability index, and increases the critical rate of the next active attack by 20%. Additionally, for each target hit, the critical rate of the next active attack is further increased by 5%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
When applying [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], it no longer requires the target to have any Hydro debuff. For each target hit, Zhaohui restores 1 point of stability index. The critical rate boost is increased, with the next active attack's critical rate increased by 20%.
Additionally, for each target hit, the critical rate is further increased by 5%.

skills.name: Wanderer's Acumen
skills.description: Selects 1 empty tile within 6 tiles and summons 1 Imperturbable Arrow, dealing AoE Hydro damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets within 2 tiles of the Imperturbable Arrow, and applies [effect:f7a93397-7984-45bc-9d87-40495dad89ec] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 empty tile within 9 tiles and summons 1 Imperturbable Arrow, dealing AoE Hydro damage equal to 110% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the Imperturbable Arrow, and applies [effect:f7a93397-7984-45bc-9d87-40495dad89ec] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Attack range is increased by 3 tiles, and effective area is increased by 1 tile. Stability damage is increased by 2 points, and damage dealt is increased to 110% of attack.

skills.name: Skybound Leap
skills.description: Selects any Imperturbable Arrow within 9 tiles, and lands on the selected tile within 2 tiles around it. Deals Hydro damage equal to 160% of attack to the nearest enemy target within 6 tiles and applies [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects any Imperturbable Arrow within 9 tiles and carries all allied units within 2 tiles of Zhaohui and lands on the selected tile within 2 tiles of the Imperturbable Arrow. Deals Hydro damage equal to 160% of attack to the nearest enemy target within 6 tiles and applies [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] and [effect:f7a93397-7984-45bc-9d87-40495dad89ec] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects any Imperturbable Arrow within 9 tiles and carries all allied units within 2 tiles of Zhaohui and lands on the selected tile within 2 tiles of the Imperturbable Arrow. Deals Hydro damage equal to 180% of attack to the nearest enemy target within 6 tiles and applies [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] and [effect:f7a93397-7984-45bc-9d87-40495dad89ec] for 2 turns. The critical damage of this attack is increased by 30%. After using this skill, Zhaohui's attack is increased by 10%, up to 3 stacks.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases stability damage dealt by 2 points. Applies [effect:f7a93397-7984-45bc-9d87-40495dad89ec] to the target for 2 turns. Relocates along with all allied units within 2 tiles of self.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The critical damage of this attack is increased by 30%, and the damage dealt is increased to 180% of attack. After using this skill, Zhaohui's attack is increased by 10%, up to 3 stacks.

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, increases the critical damage of the next active attack by 10%.

Increases Hydro damage dealt to targets in Stability Break by 45%. After the passive skill Shadow Strike triggers a jump to an Imperturbable Arrow, deals Hydro Damage equal to 80% of attack, 2 points of stability damage, and applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] for 2 turns to the nearest enemy target within attack range. Zhaohui gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
Increase damage dealt against targets with Hydro debuffs by 10%.
When the active skill Shadow Snare hits only 1 target, it deals 1 extra instance of fixed damage equal to 10% of attack and applies [effect:7dec35ce-d8cc-443e-8a4e-410233b3cda6] for 2 turns.
If any Imperturbable Arrow is on the field, restores 10% of Zhaohui's HP at the end of the action.
When using the active skill Wanderer's Acumen, Zhaohui gains 1 stack of [effect:af640815-bbef-471b-8888-cee6c3d8b4a4] and knocks the target back by 2 tiles.
If Zhaohui is within 2 tiles of any Imperturbable Arrow, reduces stability damage taken by 1 point and AoE damage taken by 30%.
Before using [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], cleanses 2 buffs from the target.

vertebrae.effect: At the start of the battle, Zhaohui summons 1 Imperturbable Arrow on surrounding tile. The maximum activations of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is increased by 1. When any Imperturbable Arrow is on the field, Zhaohui's damage dealt is increased by 10%.

doll.name: Zhaohui
doll.effects: A stoic Doll with rich combat experience, she is unpretentious and decisive in action. As the leader of Monsoon Squad, she excels in combat and handling team affairs but is still a novice at lightening the mood. Don't hesitate to welcome her - a hero pursuing justice is always worthy of trust.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Hydro debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Hydro damage dealt is increased by 5%.
damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
After inflicting a critical hit, deals 3 points of fixed stability damage to the enemy target. This effect can trigger up to 2 times per turn.

dollEffects.effectDetails: When the holder of this debuff takes damage, heals the attacker's HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt. Considered a Hydro debuff.
